sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الْمَنْسَفُ الْأُرْدُنِيُّ رَمْزاً لِلْكَرَمِ وَالضِّيَافَةِ فِي الثَّقَافَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ، حَيْثُ يُقَدَّمُ فِي الْمُنَاسَبَاتِ الْكَبِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Jordanski mansaf smatra se simbolom velikodušnosti i gostoprimstva u arapskoj kulturi, te se poslužuje u važnim prilikama.
sentences.translationEn: Jordanian Mansaf is considered a symbol of generosity and hospitality in Arab culture, and it is served on major occasions.

sentences.arabic: يَتَكَوَّنُ هَذَا الطَّبَقُ الشَّهِيرُ مِنْ لَحْمِ الضَّأْنِ الْمَطْبُوخِ بِلَبَنِ الْجَمِيدِ الْمُمَيَّزِ، وَيُوضَعُ فَوْقَ طَبَقَةٍ مِنَ الْأُرْزِ الْأَصْفَرِ.
sentences.translation: Ovo poznato jelo sastoji se od janjetine kuhane u specifičnom jameed jogurtu, a stavlja se preko sloja žute riže.
sentences.translationEn: This famous dish consists of lamb cooked in distinctive jameed yogurt, and it is placed over a layer of yellow rice.

sentences.arabic: تَضْفِي الْمُكَسَّرَاتُ الْمُحَمَّصَةُ وَخُبْزُ الشِّرَاكِ الرَّقِيقُ لَمْسَةً نِهَائِيَّةً تَجْعَلُ النَّكْهَةَ غَنِيَّةً وَمُتَكَامِلَةً.
sentences.translation: Pečeni orašasti plodovi i tanki hljeb širak daju završni dodir koji okus čini bogatim i potpunim.
sentences.translationEn: Roasted nuts and thin shrak bread add a final touch that makes the flavor rich and complete.

sentences.arabic: لَا تَقْتَصِرُ أَهَمِّيَّةُ الْمَنْسَفِ عَلَى مَذَاقِهِ فَحَسْبُ، بَلْ تَمْتَدُّ إِلَى طَرِيقَةِ تَنَاوُلِهِ الْجَمَاعِيَّةِ الَّتِي تُعَزِّزُ الرَّوَابِطَ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Značaj mansafa nije ograničen samo na njegov ukus, već se proteže i na kolektivni način konzumiranja koji jača društvene veze.
sentences.translationEn: The importance of Mansaf is not limited to its taste only, but extends to the communal way of eating it, which strengthens social bonds.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ سِرَّ نَجَاحِ هَذِهِ الْوَصْفَةِ يَكْمُنُ فِي جَوْدَةِ الْمُكَوِّنَاتِ وَالصَّبْرِ الطَّوِيلِ أَثْنَاءَ عَمَلِيَّةِ الطَّهِيِ الْبَطِيءِ.
sentences.translation: Tajna uspjeha ovog recepta leži u kvaliteti sastojaka i dugom strpljenju tokom procesa sporog kuhanja.
sentences.translationEn: The secret to the success of this recipe lies in the quality of the ingredients and long patience during the slow cooking process.
